name: S03 — Coletor · Dados do Singulare Score · v1.3
description: v1.3: Doctoralia via URL direta do perfil - elimina falsos positivos do scraping de busca.

parameters.query: SELECT tenant_id, clinic_name, doctor_name, speciality, city, state, instagram_username, website_url, google_place_id FROM public.tenants WHERE status = 'active' AND chatwoot_url IS NOT NULL AND doctor_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY tenant_id

={{ $('Coletar e Calcular Score').item.json._place_id_cache ? "UPDATE public.tenants SET google_place_id = '" + $('Coletar e Calcular Score').item.json._place_id_cache + "' WHERE tenant_id = '" + $('Coletar e Calcular Score').item.json.tenant_id + "' AND google_place_id IS NULL" : 'SELECT 1' }}

SELECT tenant_id, clinic_name, doctor_name, speciality, city, state, instagram_username, website_url, google_place_id FROM public.tenants WHERE status = 'active' AND chatwoot_url IS NOT NULL AND doctor_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY tenant_id

={{ $('Coletar e Calcular Score').item.json._place_id_cache ? "UPDATE public.tenants SET google_place_id = '" + $('Coletar e Calcular Score').item.json._place_id_cache + "' WHERE tenant_id = '" + $('Coletar e Calcular Score').item.json.tenant_id + "' AND google_place_id IS NULL" : 'SELECT 1' }}
